description: Convert tabular data between csv, json, parquet, and excel.

tools.description: Convert tabular data between csv, json, parquet, and excel. Use inline content for csv/json text, or input_path/output_path for workspace files. Use to reshape data files between steps or prepare an export.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Inline source data (csv or json text). Use this OR input_path.

schema.name: input_path
schema.description: Workspace path to read from. Use this OR content.

schema.name: output_path
schema.description: Workspace path to write to. Required for parquet/excel output.
